name: AirPods Pro (2nd Gen USB-C)
description: Apple’s most advanced earbuds featuring Active Noise Cancellation, Adaptive Audio, and seamless integration with iPhone. Offers excellent sound clarity, spatial audio, and improved battery life with USB-C charging.

name: Samsung Galaxy Buds 3 Pro
description: Samsung’s latest premium earbuds with powerful ANC, AI-powered sound optimization, and 360 Audio. Perfect for Galaxy users with seamless connectivity and high-quality calls.

name: Sony WF-1000XM5
description: Top-tier Sony earbuds with industry-leading noise cancellation, rich sound quality, and compact design. Ideal for audiophiles looking for premium listening experience.

name: JBL Live Pro 2 TWS
description: Well-balanced earbuds with adaptive noise cancelling, strong bass, and long battery life. Great for everyday use with JBL signature sound.

name: Oraimo FreePods 4
description: Affordable true wireless earbuds with decent sound, good battery life, and stylish design. Ideal for budget-conscious users.

name: Anker Soundcore Liberty 4 NC
description: Feature-packed earbuds offering strong ANC, customizable EQ, and excellent battery life at a competitive price.

name: Redmi Buds 5 Pro
description: Great mid-range earbuds with solid ANC, good sound performance, and modern design. Excellent value for money.

name: Tecno Sonic 2
description: Entry-level earbuds with decent audio, lightweight build, and reliable connectivity for everyday use.
